title: delphinium × belladonna
intro: Delphinium × belladonna, also known as the Belladonna or Deadly Nightshade, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and anesthetic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium × belladonna include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and calm the nervous system. Delphinium × belladonna can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, although it is essential to exercise caution when handling the plant due to its toxicity.
